title: Integration tests for ModuleLoader hash verification
intent: ModuleLoader verifies SHA-256 hashes on module load but this path lacks integration test coverage. Add tests that load a module, tamper with its content, and verify the loader rejects it with a clear error.
acceptance_criteria: Test loads a valid module successfully (baseline)
Test loads a module with tampered manifest and verifies rejection
Test loads a module with tampered hash field and verifies rejection
Error message includes expected vs actual hash
